summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of an ’81 Uptown run, highlighted by a monster Scarlet Begonias→Fire on the Mountain → Estimated→Eyes suite and a soaring Wharf Rat.
review: The GD‑81‑02‑27 recording is a pristine SBD source that many reviewers call “crisp”, “spectacular” and “almost hiss‑free”.  Musically the show shines – the second‑set run of Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain, followed by an extended Estimated→Eyes, plus a heartfelt Wharf Rat, are repeatedly singled out as stand‑outs.  A few listeners note a slightly muffled bass or a fast‑paced Eyes, but the consensus is that this is one of the hottest early‑‘80s performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Over 40 reviews overwhelmingly rate the show 4–5 stars, praising both performance and soundboard quality; only a handful of minor criticisms keep the rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners repeatedly describe the mix as crystal‑clear, balanced, with no analog hiss; a few note slight hissiness or bass/vocal balance issues but overall the capture is considered flawless.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
poor_songs: Eyes of the World (some find it too fast/short)
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is tight with strong classics; the second set builds a marathon 45‑minute stretch of Scarlet→Fire→Estimated→Eyes that many call the highlight, followed by a solid drum/space segment and a classic finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for soaring lead tone and vocal performance; one reviewer mentions occasional lyric flubs.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass sometimes described as buried or not cutting through clearly in a few reviews.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mixed remarks – some note his guitar is barely audible in certain jams, others enjoy his “freak‑out” moments.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboardist) receives consistent acclaim for fire‑hot playing and vocal harmonies; Keith/Vince not mentioned.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill’s drumming and the drum/space segment are highlighted as strong; a few note occasional oddities but overall positive.
